issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill assumes Bun is installed, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: bundle-typescript-library
scenarios.rationale: Both responses miss the required Bun.build() call, but B includes all necessary flags and treeshake, making it more complete.

scenarios.name: write-bun-tests
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric requirements, including mock.module(), while Response A uses vi.mock instead of mock.module() and thus misses a key element.
